title: 突發！新戰線Twitter 靠大家 !SOS!

replies.msg:
起身見到依個hashtag出現係Twitter
#FollowBackHongKong

FB account越黎越多人要影相認證，或要交身分證明文件再被審查。快啲轉場啦大家！唔好俾依場火熄滅，唔可以放棄8xx手足架

提一提，Twitter 最有效擴散係用 「Retweet with comment」！

***以下為我所見既Tweet

Hello newcomers to Twitter, especially if you are based in Hong Kong🇭🇰or Taiwan🇹🇼and English is not your native language.

Follow and RT #FollowBackHongKong and I will follow you back.

And please also follow back anyone who follows and retweets you. #StandwithHK

Hello newcomers to Twitter, especially if you are based in Hong Kong🇭🇰or Taiwan🇹🇼and English is not your native language.

Follow and RT #FollowBackHongKong and I will follow you back.

And please also follow back anyone who follows and retweets you. #StandwithHK

起身見到依個hashtag出現係Twitter
#FollowBackHongKong

FB account越黎越多人要影相認證，或要交身分證明文件再被審查。快啲轉場啦大家！唔好俾依場火熄滅，唔可以放棄8xx手足架

提一提，Twitter 最有效擴散係用 「Retweet with comment」！

***以下為我所見既Tweet

Hello newcomers to Twitter, especially if you are based in Hong Kong🇭🇰or Taiwan🇹🇼and English is not your native language.

Follow and RT #FollowBackHongKong and I will follow you back.

And please also follow back anyone who follows and retweets you. #StandwithHK
謝謝巴打， 我琴晚開左post 講，但推唔到 post。唔該晒你。
